entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal grain crop bred for resilience and productivity in Asia

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: The geographical region where sorghum breeding is examined

entities.name: SORGHUM BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing improved sorghum varieties

entities.name: CYTOPLASMIC MALE STERILITY
entities.description: A breeding challenge involving the inability of a plant to produce functional pollen

entities.name: OMICS APPROACHES
entities.description: A set of biological technologies used to analyze large-scale biological data

entities.name: TRANSCRIPTOMICS
entities.description: The study of the transcriptome, part of omics approaches

entities.name: GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of the genome, used to develop climate-resilient varieties

entities.name: PROTEOMICS
entities.description: The study of proteins, part of omics approaches

entities.name: METABOLOMICS
entities.description: The study of metabolites, part of omics approaches

entities.name: BIOINFORMATICS
entities.description: The use of computational tools to analyze biological data

entities.name: CLIMATE RESILIENCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop to withstand climate-related stresses

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Stress caused by living organisms like pests or diseases

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Stress caused by non-living factors like drought or salinity

entities.name: BIOTECHNOLOGY
entities.description: The use of biological systems or organisms to enhance agronomic traits

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics of a plant that are important for agricultural production

entities.name: FLOWERING
entities.description: The timing and process of flower development in sorghum

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical growth of the sorghum plant

entities.name: BROWN MIDRIB STRUCTURE
entities.description: A specific structural trait in sorghum affecting its use as animal feed

entities.name: ANIMAL FEED
entities.description: Material used to feed livestock, influenced by brown midrib structure

entities.name: SORGHUM GENETICS
entities.description: The study of heredity and variation in sorghum

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Farming practices that meet current needs without compromising future generations
